headline: Clorox (CLX) Stock Valuation Snapshot After Mixed Recent Performance
summary: Recent performance snapshot Clorox (CLX) has drawn fresh investor attention after a mix of short term gains and longer term share price pressure, with the stock last closing at US$96.82 and recent returns looking uneven across timeframes. See our latest analysis for Clorox. Recent momentum has been mixed, with a 30 day share price return of 7.04% partially offsetting a 90 day share price decline of 13.09% and a 1 year total shareholder return decline of 18.35%. This points to fading longer...

headline: Clorox (CLX) Stock Sees Fair Value Cut As Analysts Lower Targets
summary: Clorox is back in focus after its fair value estimate was revised from US$115.47 to US$105.29, trimming roughly 9% from the modeled price target. That reset lines up with a wave of target cuts and at least one downgrade, as analysts reassess what investors are willing to pay given the current discussion around execution, margins, and growth. Looking ahead, you will see how this evolving narrative might shape the way you track Clorox and interpret future research moves on the stock. Wall...
